---
title: "Mary Elizabeth Townsend"
---

## Mary Elizabeth Townsend

**Dates:** (1841-1918)

**Maiden name:** (Butler)

### Description

founder of the Girls’ Friendly Society

### Biography

She married (1863) Frederick Townsend (1823-1905);  they lived at Shedfield Lodge, near Wickham, Hants. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th  [1901]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
